case_title: RUSIN KATHE WHITE VS WILLIAMSON THOMAS R.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON THOMAS R.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF AUG-14-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WILLIAMSON THOMAS R. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RUSIN KATHE WHITE $891.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $899.00, ITEMS FROM STATEMENT ALLOWED 4,5,6,8,9,11,12,13,14 & 15 PLUS BALANCE OF COSTS ($91.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RUSIN KATHE WHITE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON THOMAS R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMSON THOMAS R. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUSIN KATHE WHITE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUSIN KATHE WHITE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON THOMAS R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
